=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN
Madison Square Garden
New York City, New York
11 November 2002
 
Received in a trade long time ago' as a remaster.
Lineage, taper and remastering unknown
drop between CDr
Great sound

0.-Intro 
1.-Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum
2.-Yea! Heavy And A Bottle Of Bread
3.-Tombstone Blues
4.-The End Of The Innocence (Don Henley/Bruce Hornsby)
5.-Things Have Changed
6.-Brown Sugar (Mick Jagger/Keith Richards)
7.-Masters Of War
8.-It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding)
9.-Just Like A Woman
10.-Drifter's Escape
11.-Shelter From The Storm
12.-Old Man (Neil Young)


13.-Honest With Me
14.-The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll
15.-High Water (for Charlie Patton)
16.-Mutineer (Warren Zevon)
17.-Bye And Bye
18.-Summer Days
19.-Knockin' On Heaven's Door
20.-All Along The Watchtower
 
 
Concert # 1483 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 30 of the 2002 US Fall Tour. 2002 concert # 100. 
 
Concert # 84 with the 13th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).
 
7-9, 12, 14, 19 acoustic with the band.
 
1-5, 8, 13, 15-17 Bob Dylan (piano).
 
5 Charlie Sexton (dobro).
 
8 Larry Campbell (cittern).
 
9, 10 Bob Dylan (harmonica).-9, 16 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
 
11 Larry Campbell (mandolin).
 
13 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
 
6, 12, 19 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).
 
Note. Live debut of Yea! Heavy And A Bottle Of Bread.
 
BobTalk
That was a request of course (after Yea! Heavy And A Bottle Of Bread).
